title: Farm Hop-Picking Visits (Late Aug–Sept) & Kent Apple Counting

main_route.excerpt: Simon, Eve + Tinder have left to go hop picking. It went well. Simon fixed machines. Eve made rag dolls with Nina, Backgammon with Seb, sewed a draw string bag with Joseph. Country life filmed the family at Newnham hops.
main_route.notes: The farm is consistently referred to without a precise name; 'Newnham hops' indicates the Newnham area of Kent. Multiple visits: Aug 25-26, ~Aug 29 to ~Sept 3, Sept 9-14.

main_route.excerpt: Thursday 23rd Sept Simon picked Eve up from dentist & we're off at [?B] 11.15. to see Charles apple counting in Kent. Manually by Richard & Mary in daylights
main_route.notes: Apple-counting farm in Kent; precise location not given. Simon and Eve stayed overnight ('supper with Charles in van', 'Friday Charles arrived for breakfast').

main_route.excerpt: Google advised us to go up towards Cambridge after the Dartford Tunnel (M11) + we need to get to the solicitor.
At 10 we left for home. Simon needs to get home to exchange contracts on the factory building.

stops.excerpt: 5.45. left home for farm. Supper with William. Saw children before bed.

unresolved.issue: Illegible character before 11.15 departure time on 23rd Sept; likely a place abbreviation or word — does not affect route.
unresolved.excerpt: we're off at [?B] 11.15. to see Charles apple counting in Kent

unresolved.issue: The hop-picking farm is referred to only as 'the farm' or 'William's farm'; 'Newnham hops' is the strongest locating clue but the precise farm name and address are not given in the diary.
unresolved.excerpt: Country life filmed the family at Newnham hops

unresolved.issue: The farm where Charles was apple counting in Kent (with Richard & Mary, Oct 6–7 van trip also noted) is not named; it may be the same farm or a different one.
unresolved.excerpt: We arrived at 3. Tea with Richard + Mary, George + Charles + Tom.

summary: Multiple visits by Simon and Eve (with dog Tinder) to a hop-picking farm near Newnham in Kent during late August and September 2021, assisting with hop harvest and machine maintenance; Country Life magazine filmed the family at Newnham hops. A separate overnight trip on 23–24 September took Simon and Eve to Kent to watch son Charles count apples by machine at night, returning home via the Dartford Tunnel.
extraction_notes: This diary entry (a single spread B_0356) covers a sequence of out-and-back visits rather than a continuous touring trip: (1) Aug 25–26 to William's farm; (2) ~Aug 29 – ~Sept 3 hop-picking stay; (3) Sept 9–14 return to farm; (4) Sept 23–24 Kent apple-counting overnight with Charles. The Oct 6–7 van trip (Simon collecting lights and workbench from Chad) is administrative and not included as a route stop. Page B_0356_L has no printed page number; B_0356_R is page 57. Dates are inferred as 2021 based on trip_id and context; no year appears on the diary pages.
